text:
あら、意外！
アンタ、へっぽこぴーだから
逃げ出すと思ってたのに。

でも、新米ならやっておいて
損はないと思うわよ。

ていうか、やんなきゃダメ！
でも、どうなることかし

Well, color me surprised.
I figured you would've hopped in your little
clown car and sped far, far away by now.

But this's good stuff for a rookie to get under
their belt.

Not like you have much choice in the
matter if you wanna end up being somebody
around here. Now, let's get this circus show
on the road.
